prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical data for SYK was used to estimate key parameters: an approximate annual drift (average return) of 10% and an annual volatility (standard deviation of returns) of 18%. These parameters were converted to daily equivalents. A total of 100,000 simulations were conducted for the next 6 trading days. The point estimate is the median of these simulated future prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles (e.g., 25th and 75th percentiles for the 50% CI) of the simulated price distribution.
